caption:
Your phone isn't the only lead channel losing you money.

Most owners test call response time. Almost nobody tests their own website contact form.

Run this today. Have a friend fill out your contact form. Time how long it takes until they get a reply that actually reaches them.

Most forms only notify the business. The person who just typed in their name and number hears nothing for hours.

The fix: trigger an automatic email and text the moment the form submits, confirming you got the request and when you'll call. Under 60 seconds, every time.

The same speed standard that wins phone leads applies here. Whoever replies first books the job.

Want this built into your website this week?

DM "FORM"

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SmallBusinessMarketing #HomeServices #SpeedToLead
rationale: Reels still lead reach for cold audiences in 2026, and this tests an unclaimed channel (the website contact form, not calls or texts) with a friend-run, logically sound audit and a concrete fix an owner can ship this week.
